sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72199" key="oi)boiboi=" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οἰβοιβοῖ</orth>, exclam., <sense id="n72199.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">οἴμοι</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:124:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">124.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
